column1: # schema: 14
# MacStudio LLM — model catalog (seed)
# Pipe-delimited, shell-readable, TUI-editable (see `llm-models`). This file is a
# SEED: on `setup.sh --apply` it is copied to /usr/local/etc/macstudio-models/catalog.tsv
# only if that file is absent or has an older "# schema:" line (old one is backed up
# first). After that the live copy is TUI-owned — add models via `llm-models`.
# Only READY, pre-converted MLX repos belong here (NO local conversion). Source =
# HuggingFace, repo-ids are `org/name` (not URLs). Gated repos (gated=yes) need an HF
# token (`llm-models` -> t) + accepting the licence on the model page.
# Roles (the backend is fixed per role):
#   role=text   -> alias 'main' (mlx-vlm / mlx_vlm.server — UNIFIED text+images, KV-quant;
#                  needs a VLM arch like gemma-4). mlx-vlm is the only text engine.
#   role=embed  -> Infinity (alias 'embed', on-demand BGE DENSE embeddings for RAG, Torch MPS).
#   role=rerank -> Infinity (alias 'rerank', on-demand BGE cross-encoder reranker, Torch MPS).
# A note containing BROKEN (or BROKEN[<engine>]) makes a model non-selectable for that
# engine (main -> mlx-vlm; embed/rerank -> infinity). Sampling cols 14-17
# (temperature/top_p/frequency_penalty/presence_penalty) = per-model defaults injected
# into the LiteLLM 'main' alias (clients can override). Empty for embed/rerank.
# This seed is intentionally LEAN: gemma-4 QAT mains (mlx-vlm, text+image+tools) + a BGE
# embed/rerank pair. gemma4-26b-qat is the default main. (The main does images itself, so
# there is no separate OCR alias; document OCR uses paperless-ocr's Apple Vision path.)
# columns:
# id|hf_repo|role|engine|quant|gb|gated|reasoning_parser|tool_parser|max_kv_size|max_num_seqs|rating|notes|temperature|top_p|frequency_penalty|presence_penalty
# ── Gemma-4 QAT mains (mlx-vlm 0.6.3) — unified text+image+tools, KV-quant ──
# Google QAT 4-bit builds (gemma4_unified, image-text-to-text). QAT beats naive PTQ 4-bit
# (the plain -4bit mlx builds have a PLE-quant garbage-output bug). Verified on Mac 2026-07-04
# on mlx-vlm 0.6.3: text+tools+vision all pass, vision 4/4 colors.

gemma4-12b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-12B-it-qat-4bit|text|mlxvlm|4bit|11|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|4|QAT 12B dense unified, multimodal text+image+tools. mlx-vlm 0.6.3: text 19 tok/s, tools OK, vision 4/4. gated; native max 262144|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

gemma4-26b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-qat-4bit|text|mlxvlm|4bit|16|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|5|DEFAULT main. QAT 26B-A4B MoE (~4B active), multimodal text+image+tools. mlx-vlm 0.6.3: text 32 tok/s, tools OK, vision 4/4 - faster AND stronger than 12B. gated; native max 262144|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

gemma4-e4b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-4bit|text|mlxvlm|4bit|8|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|3|QAT E4B edge main, multimodal text+image+tools. mlx-vlm 0.6.3: text 34 tok/s, tools OK, vision 4/4. fast/light ~7.5 GB. gated|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

gemma4-e2b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-E2B-it-qat-4bit|text|mlxvlm|4bit|6|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|3|QAT E2B smallest multimodal, text+image+tools. mlx-vlm 0.6.3: text 53 tok/s (fastest), tools OK, vision 4/4. ~5.2 GB. gated|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

bge-m3|BAAI/bge-m3|embed|infinity|fp16|2|no|||||5|Multilingual DENSE embedder (BGE-M3, 1024-dim, 8192 ctx) for RAG. On-demand via Infinity on Torch MPS, paired with bge-reranker-v2-m3. LiteLLM alias 'embed' (/v1/embeddings). Not gated.||||

bge-reranker-v2-m3|BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3|rerank|infinity|fp16|2|no|||||5|Multilingual cross-encoder RERANKER (bge-reranker-v2-m3) matching bge-m3. On-demand via Infinity on Torch MPS. LiteLLM alias 'rerank' (/v1/rerank, /rerank). Not gated.||||
